message:
docs: update FEATURE_PARITY.md — all 51 previously-missing CLI surfaces now implemented

All correlation/impact, file analysis, label analytics, search, drift/baseline,
and workflow CLI flags have been implemented. Updated parity summary totals
(83 complete, 27 partial, 0 missing) and open gaps section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
